verses.text: “Bawng ahi a, tuu ahi zongin, poina a nei, kisapna khat peuhpeuh a om peuhmah Topa note' Pasian' tungah biakpiakna-in na pia kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa note' Pasian-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi
“ Topa note' Pasian in note hong piak khua khat peuhpeuh sungah numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, ama thuciamna palsatin, Topa na Pasian uh muhna-ah a sia-in a gamtatna kimu-in
pasian dangte' na semin tuate bia ahi zongin, keimah in ka kham ahi ni ahi a, kha ahi a, vantung na khat peuhpeuhte' na semin bia ahi zongin
no kiangah hong kigenin tua thu na zak uh leh, note in limtakin na kantel ding uh a, Israel-te sungah tua bang a kihhuai na a kigamtatna thu a om mah ahih takpi leh
numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin tua banga a sia-in a gamta mi pen na khua pua uhah na paipih ding uh a, tua numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin suang tawh na denglum ding uh hi
Teci nih ahih kei leh thum bang genna tawh a si dingpa kithat ding a, teci khat bek thugenna tawh mi kithatlo ding hi
A that dingin tecite masa ding a, tua khit ciangin midang khempeuh in hih ding uh hi. Tua bangin note' sung panin hoihlohna na siangsak ding uh hi

“Mi khatlekhat kithah khakna, khatlekhat thu kituhna, mi khatlekhat kisatna, note-a' dingin a haksalua thu khat peuhpeuh note' khuasungah khen ding hong om leh, note kithawi-in Topa na Pasian un a teelna mun
Levi siampite leh tua huna thukhente kiangah pai-in thu na dong ding uh a, amaute in note kiangah thukhenna ding hong gen ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in a teelna mun panin note' tungah hong gen bangun na hih ding uh hi. Amaute in note tungah hong lah bangin limtakin na hih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh a
amaute in note tungah hong piak thuhilhna leh note tungah hong gen uh thukhensatna tawh kizui-in na hih ding uh hi. Amaute in note tungah hong gen bang teekteekin na hih ding uh hi

Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah nasem dingin a ding siampipa' thu ahi a, thukhenpa' thu ahi zongin man'lohna tawh a khengvala a gamta mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Tua bangin Israel-te' sung panin hoihlohna na siangsak ding uh hi
Tua hi leh mi khempeuh in za-in, kihta-in, a khengvalin gamta ngam nawnlo ding uh hi.

“ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitangah tungin, note in tua leitang nei-in a tungah na ten' uh ciangin, ‘Eite' kimkota om minamte khempeuh mah bangin eite' tungah kumpi khat i koih ding hi,’ na ci nuam khading uh hi

Topa note' Pasian in a teel mipa note' tungah kumpi-in na koih thei takpi ding uh hi. Ahi zongin na mipihte bek uh lak panin kumpi-in mi khat na koih ding uh a, na sanggam uh a hilo gamdang mi khat no' tungah na koih thei kei ding uh hi

Amah in ama aituam dingin sakol tampi neilo ding hi. Topa in no kiangah, ‘Hih lampi tawnin na kilehkik ngei kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci ahih manin, amah in sakolte a lei dingin Egypt gamah mite paisaklo ding hi
A lungsim heikhia khading ahih manin zi la thuahlo ding a, ama-a' dingin ngun leh kham zong nakpi takin behlaplo ding hi
Ama kumpi tokhom tungah a tut ciangin Levi siampite' kep hih thukhamte ama-a' dingin laibu khat sungah gelh ding hi

Hih thukham sunga thute leh hih ngeinate kemin zuihna tawh Topa a Pasian zahtak ding a theihna ding, a mipihte tungah ama lungsim a kiliatsak lohna ding, thupiaknate them khat zong a pelhlohna ding, leh Israel-te sung ahi ama kumpi gam sungah amah leh a tate saupi a om theihna dingin amah in a nuntak sung tawntung tua sunga thute sim ding hi.
